context: Tests whether the agent correctly separates products from variants, uses proper UUID generation syntax, employs integer/NUMERIC pricing, implements the correct product status values, builds partial indexes for active products, and handles cascading deletes and image-variant associations appropriately.

checklist.name: Products/variants separated
checklist.description: Schema has distinct products and product_variants tables — products are not the same table as variants

checklist.name: UUID primary keys
checklist.description: Primary key columns use UUID type with DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() (not SERIAL or auto-increment integers)

checklist.name: Slug column on products
checklist.description: Products table includes a slug column (VARCHAR, UNIQUE, NOT NULL) for human-readable URLs

checklist.name: Price as NUMERIC or integer
checklist.description: Price columns use NUMERIC(10,2) in SQL OR design-notes.md states prices are stored as integer cents — does NOT use FLOAT or REAL for price

checklist.name: Status CHECK constraint
checklist.description: Products table status column has a CHECK constraint allowing exactly the values 'active', 'draft', and 'archived'

checklist.name: Partial index on active status
checklist.description: An index on products.status includes a WHERE status = 'active' partial filter (not a full-table index on status)

checklist.name: Single-variant pattern noted
checklist.description: design-notes.md or SQL comments mention that single-variant products still get one variant row (not zero variants)

checklist.name: Images table with variant FK
checklist.description: Product images are stored in a separate table with a variant_id foreign key that uses ON DELETE SET NULL (not CASCADE, not omitted)

checklist.name: Images ordered by position
checklist.description: Product images table has a position column and an index that includes both product_id and position

checklist.name: Cascade to variants/images/attributes
checklist.description: Foreign keys from variants, images, and attributes back to products use ON DELETE CASCADE

checklist.name: No cascade to orders
checklist.description: design-notes.md mentions soft delete or avoiding cascading deletes into order/line-item tables (not hard-deleting order records when products are deleted)

checklist.name: Variant title auto-generation noted
checklist.description: design-notes.md or SQL comments mention that variant titles are generated by concatenating option values (e.g., 'Red / Large') rather than entered manually
